data.summary: Drafted dormant-customer re-engagement workflow. Defined trigger, conditions, and 3-step action sequence.

steps.result: All actions valid against current schema

fields.label: Trigger
fields.value: Customer has no order in last 60 days

fields.label: Step 1
fields.value: Send re-engagement email with category highlights

fields.label: Step 2
fields.value: Wait 5 days; if no order, create rep follow-up task

fields.label: Step 3
fields.value: Wait 10 days; if no response, flag account for executive review

data.message: Kai has staged this workflow for your review. Activating it will start running against the 32 matched customers immediately.

closingText.text: Workflow drafted: 3-step re-engagement sequence triggered by 60-day dormancy. 32 customers currently match — including 7 VIPs with $2.1M combined LTV. Want to test against the last 30 days first or activate now?
